programme.title: Bear Man
programme.desc: Dua ekor beruang dari sebuah Institut Teknologi berubah menjadi manusia setelah memakan bawang putih dan mugwort. Kini, salah satu dari mereka telah tumbuh menjadi polisi, sementara yang lain menjadi seorang gangster.

programme.title: Ditto
programme.desc: Ditto mengisahkan seorang mahasiswa teknik di sebuah universitas bernama Kim Yong. Dia mulai masuk kuliah tahun 1995, namun harus cuti hingga tahun 1999 karena menjalani wajib militer. Suatu hari, Yong menemukan sebuah radio antik yang bisa terhubung dengan masa depan. Yong berkomunikasi dengan Kim Mu-Nee, seorang mahasiswi yang hidup dimasa sekarang, berkuliah di jurusan sosiologi. Komunikasi dari dua periode berbeda ini membuat kisah hidup mereka terungkap satu sama lain.

programme.title: The Woman In The White Car
programme.desc: Setelah penusukan, Do Kyung membawa saudara perempuannya yang tak sadarkan diri ke rumah sakit. Penyelidikan polisi mengungkap identitas palsu dan hubungan mengejutkan.

programme.title: Rolling (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Juri, seorang gadis muda berusia 25 tahun, berhenti bersosialisasi dan hanya tinggal di rumah. Ibunya, Young-shim, berjuang melewati masa sulit, masih menjalankan restoran Kim-bob miliknya. Suatu hari, Young-shim pergi untuk merawat ibunya yang sakit, dan Juri mengambil alih restoran secara tak terduga.

programme.title: Honey Sweet (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang pengembang produk makanan manis yang mulai kehilangan semangat hidup bertemu dengan seorang petugas penagih pinjaman yang ceria, saat membantu adiknya yang terlilit utang. Pertemuan tak terduga yang berlanjut dengan makan bersama itu membawa mereka pada sudut pandang baru tentang kehidupan dan kebahagiaan.

programme.title: Where Would You Like To Go?
The Night Owl
programme.desc: Seorang tunanetra yang merupakan ahli akupunktur secara ajaib mampu melihat secara normal di malam hari, dan ia tidak sengaja menyaksikan kematian putra mahkota.

programme.title: Spiritwalker
programme.desc: Seorang pria kehilangan ingatannya dan terbangun di dalam tubuh baru setiap 12 jam. Di tengah pencarian identitasnya, ia bertemu dengan seorang wanita yang mengaku mengenal dirinya.

programme.title: The Old Woman With The Knife
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh bayaran tua yang mahir menyingkirkan penjahat terburuk di masyarakat bertemu dengan seorang anak didik muda yang bersemangat untuk mempelajari keahlian tersebut. Saat mereka menjalin ikatan yang tak terduga, pembunuh veteran itu menemukan tujuan baru di masa senja hidupnya yang penuh kekerasan dan rutinitas.

programme.title: Rolling
programme.desc: Juri yang depresi terjebak di rumah selama penyebaran Covid. Saat ibunya pergi mengunjungi sang nenek, ia harus menjalankan restoran Kimbap sampai ibunya kembali.

programme.title: Rolling
programme.desc: Juri yang depresi terjebak di rumah selama penyebaran Covid. Saat ibunya pergi mengunjungi sang nenek, ia harus menjalankan restoran Kimbap sampai ibunya kembali.

programme.title: Boy In The Pool
programme.desc: Seorang gadis yang menyukai berenang bertemu dengan seorang anak laki-laki dengan kaki berselaput dan jatuh cinta padanya. Seiring waktu, gadis itu mengalami konflik batin antara mendukung anak laki-laki itu sebagai perenang yang menjanjikan dan mencegah dirinya dari kompleks inferioritas.

programme.title: Where Would You Like To Go?
The Killer
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh yang kecewa menerima satu serangan terakhir dengan harapan dapat menggunakan penghasilannya untuk mengembalikan penglihatan seorang penyanyi yang secara tidak sengaja dibutakannya.

programme.title: The Priests (TVN Movies)
programme.desc: Dua pendeta harus menyelidiki apakah seorang gadis muda diserang oleh roh jahat atau pelaku pelecehan seksual manusia agar dapat menyelamatkan nyawanya.

programme.title: Honey Sweet
programme.desc: Chi-ho adalah seorang perancang produk nan sukses, sementara Il-young bekerja di suatu perusahaan pinjaman. Mereka bertemu saat Chi-ho mencoba membayar hutang kakaknya. Kebetulan membuat mereka menjadi dekat.

programme.title: Peninsula (TVN Movies)
programme.desc: Berlatar belakang 4 tahun setelah film "Train To Busan." Masyarakat di semenanjung Korea Selatan yang selamat dari kehancuran, berjuang untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: The Villainess
programme.desc: Dibesarkan sejak kecil untuk menjadi pembunuh bayaran elit, Sook-hee memulai serangkaian aksi kekerasan dan balas dendam demi akhirnya meraih kebebasan dan melepaskan diri dari masa lalunya.

programme.title: Ditto
programme.desc: Ditto mengisahkan seorang mahasiswa teknik di sebuah universitas bernama Kim Yong. Dia mulai masuk kuliah tahun 1995, namun harus cuti hingga tahun 1999 karena menjalani wajib militer. Suatu hari, Yong menemukan sebuah radio antik yang bisa terhubung dengan masa depan. Yong berkomunikasi dengan Kim Mu-Nee, seorang mahasiswi yang hidup dimasa sekarang, berkuliah di jurusan sosiologi. Komunikasi dari dua periode berbeda ini membuat kisah hidup mereka terungkap satu sama lain.

programme.desc: Sebuah cerita tentang pemimpin tim investigasi, Hwang Joon-cheol, yang bertugas menyelidiki anak laki-laki yang dicurigai melakukan perampokan di supermarket kota setempat, 'Woori Super'.

programme.title: The Favor
programme.desc: Sebuah film okultisme tentang perjuangan sebuah keluarga untuk melepaskan diri dari kutukan mengerikan yang diberikan kepada mereka sebagai imbalan atas sebuah mukjizat yang sangat mereka dambakan.

programme.title: Two and a half men

programme.title: Cobra Kai

programme.title: On the edge of tomorrow

programme.title: A fake wife
programme.desc: Danny wants to win over Palmer, a girl much younger than him. To pique her interest, he hires his assistant, Katherine, to show her that his love for her is such that he is about to divorce his wife.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: The largest tuning trade fair in Europe takes place every year in Friedrichshafen. The Tuning World Bodensee. There are more than 1,000 extraordinary cars to marvel at on Lake Constance. Over 200 international exhibitors from the areas of tuning vehicles and accessories present their world premieres and exclusive conversions on around 85,000 square meters of exhibition space. Lucy is there for us. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: We're getting to the bottom of the current retro trend: Purist café racers and similarly classic motorcycles in the style of the 50s to 80s are on the rise worldwide. Hollywood star Orlando Bloom had a BMW S 1000 R individually tuned in Los Angeles under the motto New Heritage. Motorcycles is showing its classically styled custom bike and other representatives of the heritage scene at the Concorso d'Eleganza Villa d'Este on Lake Como and at the Wheels And Waves festival in Biarritz. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: After accidents, there are often kilometer-long queues of cars. To get through it, the only thing that helps is patience and anticipation of the vacation. And of course they: the ADAC traffic jam advisors. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Java House Grand Prix of Arlington, Streets of Arlington, Texas

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: “Setra” – this name applies worldwide to buses of the highest quality. One of the largest and most modern bus factories in the world is located here in Neu-Ulm. EvoBus GmbH – a wholly owned subsidiary of Daimler AG – produces transport vehicles on over 700,000 square meters. Well over 3,000 Setra and Mercedes buses leave the production halls every year. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Modern goods logistics! Without them, our everyday digital life would be hard to imagine. We order online every day and at any time. We expect everything to arrive on time - whether it's clothing, a printer spare part or a delivery of screws. But how does it work, smoothly, on time and safely? After all, we live in turbulent times: digitalization, climate crisis, growing global population and politically and economically unstable conditions. How does the logistics industry deal with such challenges? To answer these questions, we have to delve deep into the world of modern goods logistics. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They guarantee an exclusive appearance and stand for status, prestige and perfection more than any other vehicle, the international limousines from Rolls Royce, Bentley, Mercedes, BMW and Jaguar. They are the crowning achievement of global automotive creation and define the standard of grandiose luxury and elegant comfort. Dream Cars presents the most expensive, luxurious and exclusive limousines in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: When you think of Aston Martin, you automatically think of James Bond and incredibly expensive and sleek sports cars. The British luxury brand also had limousines in its range, such as the Aston Martin Lagonda, which was introduced in 1976. A solvent Aston fan had the V8 sedan extensively converted into a station wagon. Classic Ride presents the Aston Martin Lagonda Shooting Brake and other unique pieces. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: Fuel of the future? Hydrogen and wind power? Hamburg Airport is experimenting with the climate-neutral production of kerosene. Also: six generations of Porsche 911 Turbo at the Hockenheimring with ex-rally world champion Walter Röhrl. And: the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera super sports car in the driving report and the Q2, Audi's smallest SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: 50 years of the Porsche 911, 60 years of the Chevrolet Corvette: two legends, two myths, two dream cars, and: two philosophies. The Porsche 911 and the Chevrolet Corvette are the sports car icons in Europe and the USA. Both unique, both with a distinctive design, both the epitome of a sports car. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: BMW M1, the legendary vehicles of the Procar series, are all back at the start in Salzburg for the first time. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Every day, city dwellers wage a nerve-wracking battle for the last remaining parking space. Not only is the number of vehicles on the roads constantly increasing, but the models are also constantly growing in length and width. The trend towards SUVs puts the crown on this problem. A real war has now broken out between small cars and SUVs. Perfect Ride goes to war for the last gap with the poster child for waste, the BMW X6 and the Smart forfour designed especially for the city. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Today a treat for sports car connoisseurs: the Aston Martin V8 Vantage, the British coupé in the spotlight. And an insight into a life on two wheels: Ernst Jakob Henne set 76 world speed records on BMW machines. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Stars, mix of styles and a blunder - today's topics at Tuning: Crazy tour bus: The T4 from Samy Deluxe and his gang gets a new life. Modern style mix: There is nothing original about Markus' Polo anymore. XS threesome with XL performance. The 3 Series Compact from Schnitzer mutates into a sports car horror. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes have set up shop on a huge industrial site. This is the ultimate showdown between an extremely fast stuntman and a no less sporty BMW 3 Series... (channel info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.sub-title: Classics on the way to auction
programme.desc: In this episode of Top Speed, presenter Martin Utberg visits the vintage car gallery in Toffen, Switzerland. It has been a permanent address for lovers of classic automobiles for over four decades and is known for its regular vintage car auctions. Together with auctioneer Serge Stotzer and his team, Martin takes a look behind the scenes of the preparations for the next auction. Some of the vehicles that will go under the hammer on Saturday, March 21st will be presented in more detail - and Martin will also get behind the wheel himself to experience these classics on the road. An exciting preview (channel information).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: What is the essence of sports cars? Perfomance? Precision? Or the incomparable feeling of mastering the road. For example in the McLaren 600 LT: A corner robber with a dynamic that makes car fanatics' hearts beat faster. In the Aston Martin Vantage Roadster, British tradition and power merge to create an irresistible open-air experience. And: Alfa Romeo Giulia GTAm. (Station info).

programme.title: German Rallycross Championship 2024
programme.desc: Eight races on four different routes: The German Rallycross Championship is looking for its new champion for 2024. The drivers fight for the titles in six different classes on rallycross routes in Germany and the Netherlands. Short sprint races take place on tracks with a mix of asphalt and gravel. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2026
Armoy
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride

Today a treat for sports car connoisseurs: the Aston Martin V8 Vantage, the British coupé in the spotlight. And an insight into a life on two wheels: Ernst Jakob Henne set 76 world speed records on BMW machines. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: Icon of the New Heritage wave: BMW R nineT
programme.desc: In 2013, the BMW R nineT, a puristic retro roadster, came onto the market that one would not have expected from the brand from Munich, which is considered to be conservative. The modern technology is deliberately prepared for individual conversion to custom bikes, which are becoming increasingly popular in the young motorcycle scene worldwide. We show what idea lies behind the concept of the retro roadster and what qualities and possible weaknesses the classic boxer motorcycle reveals in the practical test. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Maschinenfabrik Augsburg-Nürnberg AG. In short MAN. The company has existed for over 250 years. It all started in 1758 with ore mining in Oberhausen. Today the company employs 47,700 people worldwide. The supplier of trucks, buses, turbomachinery, diesel and marine engines now holds leading market positions. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Saving energy is a must, especially in the automotive industry. It's good that the competition is so great. Developments are in full swing and manufacturers present their latest “green” concepts at every motor show. Motorvision TV takes a close look at current developments and takes a wide variety of aspects into account. What's new in engines? (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Jaguar F-Type, Aston Martin Vanquish Volante or Bentley Continental, English convertibles are elegant and exclusive and, they are fun. English convertibles enjoy cult status all over the world because, after all, the fun of open and fast two-seaters was invented in England. English roadsters offer more sporting spirit than any other, equipped with power, luxury and elegance, they are the most fascinating convertibles of all. Rolls Royce Phantom Drophead, Jaguar F-Type or Aston Martin Vanquish Volante, Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking English convertibles of all time. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: They offer driving fun with a guarantee: classic convertibles with a lot of tinder. This species includes, for example, the Sunbeam Tiger. Under the hood of the compact roadster is a powerful V8 engine from Ford USA. With a heavy foot on the accelerator, the Tiger driver easily draws 20-meter-long lines on the asphalt. Today the Sunbeam Tiger is a cheap alternative to an incredibly expensive Shelby Cobra. Also in the show: A Beetle convertible from 1951 with Porsche power. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: What role will digitalization play in future automobile manufacturing? We at Porsche Digital are looking for answers to this question. Furthermore: a Skoda, of all things, developed into a classic off-road vehicle in New Zealand in the 1960s and 70s. And: the Volkswagen Arteo shooting brake in the test and a trip to the Toyota winter driving school in Saalfelden in the Defender. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Vive la Difference: Always unusual in design, always exceptional in driving comfort, often avant-garde: the Renault brand cars. Renault is making history with the Dauphine, R4, R16 and R5 models. The R4 is the car of the hippies, the R16 is the perfect vehicle for the Francophile father and the R5 is one of the most popular small cars of the 80s. Renault also writes racing and rally history: the victories of the blue flounder, the Renault Alpine, at the Monte Carlo Rally will never be forgotten. Car History shows the history of the French Volkswagen, from the first model through the classics of the 60s, 70s and 80s to (channel info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Dubai – the largest and most important Motor Sow in the Middle East takes place here. The sheikhs have a penchant for fast and exclusive vehicles, so everything that has a reputation in the car world is gathered here. And: Supercars go straight from the stand in Dubai. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: A small car and a super sports car with the same drive concept? That actually exists. The Porsche GT3 and the Smart both have rear-wheel drive, i.e. the engine in the rear and driven rear wheels. In general, vehicles with rear-wheel drive and rear-wheel drive are considered sporty, emotional, but also a bit unpredictable. Does that apply to these two? Also on the show: The sportiest mid-range sedan on the market. Of course with rear-wheel drive: The BMW 3 Series. Rear-wheel drive across vehicle classes – in Perfect Ride. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: In 1999, a new star in the roadster sky is expected to shake up the highly competitive market. The Honda S2000 comes to us as a pure athlete with rear-wheel drive and 240 hp from just 2.0 liters of displacement. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.sub-title: Recaro Tuning Event Show and Shine
programme.desc: Drifters, speed junkies and show stars the topics at tuning today: party without end at the Recaro tuning event. Show and shine, drift show and quarter-mile races. We are in. Mercedes E-Class brutal: The Brabus K 8 with 530 hp in the race track test. Full throttle action and lots of weird guys. The Speednation in Großenhain – a playground for petrol addicts! Speed ​​rush: on the move with more than 330 things on the Nardo high-speed oval. AND: Tuning without an expiration date: A four-seater Golf with turbo power makes you look elegant and timeless. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: This episode of Stunt Heroes is all about stunt driver Christoph Knobloch called Knobi. He drives over a ramp at 50 km/h and crashes into cars stacked on top of each other. The dangerous thing about the stunt: several gasoline barrels explode at the same time! If something goes wrong, Knobi is also in danger.... (channel info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​presenter Martin Utberg takes viewers to the Retro Classics Essen vintage car fair. On site he not only meets exhibitors, but also prominent guests from the classic car scene on the trade fair stage. They tell stories from times past - stories that you only hear when they come from those who have experienced them themselves. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Space meets overwhelming performance. Power sports station wagons are family cars with sports car DNA. The Audi RS6 has developed over decades from an inconspicuous family car into a technological masterpiece. But his competition should not be underestimated either. A look at the development history of sports suits shows how they rose to become the performance machines of today. (Station info).

programme.title: King of the Roads 2024
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Today's show is all about: premium performance. Because these two crackers deliver both in their own, unique way and with future-oriented drives. We were exclusively at the world premiere of the Mercedes CLA in Rome and revealed all the details about design, technology and features. Also: Six exciting facts about the ultimate station wagon, the BMW M5 Touring! (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.sub-title: VW all-wheel drive on snow and ice
programme.desc: We're doing the ultimate winter test in the Arctic Circle! Three of the latest Volkswagen all-wheel drive vehicles, the Golf R, Tiguan and ID.4 GTX, compete against each other on snow and ice in Sweden. Which VW delivers the most driving fun, the best control and the wildest drifts? From classic combustion engines to electric precision, we show how each model masters the icy curves. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is considered the most successful luxury sedan in the world, a synonym for comfort and opulence and sets standards in terms of technology and safety: the Mercedes S-Class. But why is that so? What makes this vehicle so special and sets it apart from all others? We drive all model series, from the 450 SEL 6.9 to the current S 580 e, and explore the fascination of each model. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Practical, comfortable and highway-tested. These German everyday heroes bring home the shopping or are a hell of a lot of fun. At the Lausitzring we let the two most powerful VW Golfs compete against each other: GTI Clubsport versus R. Who does the job better? And the new VW Passat will be more comfortable and efficient. Will it get Volkswagen back on track? (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: They offer driving fun with a guarantee: classic convertibles with a lot of tinder. This species includes, for example, the Sunbeam Tiger. programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Some of the most traditional motorcycle brands in the world come from Great Britain. Manufacturers such as AJS, BSA, Norton, Triumph and Vincent set standards in terms of performance and drivability and were also always at the forefront of motorcycle racing. Today Triumph alone holds the flag of British motorcycle construction high, especially in the so-called modern classics. We get to the bottom of the myth of the British Way of Motorbiking - with test drives of exciting motorcycle models and with a bike trip over the varied and challenging roads of Scotland. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Abdulaziz Al Faisal is a Saudi prince and one of Arabia's most famous racing drivers. We accompany the prince on the day of one of the most important races of his career. His toughest competitor is the Austrian Clemens Schmid, who starts from pole position. An exciting race is coming up. Countless attempts by the prince to overtake go wrong. Shortly before the end, Schmid makes a fatal mistake (channel info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The origin story of a car is a closely guarded secret. For the first time, it was possible to look over the shoulders of the developers for five years. From the idea to the finished car. 2003 – The automotive industry is healthy and stronger than ever. The supply and demand system works. But what about a new model that was decided in these good times and will now come onto the market in the crisis? (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Price drop and range revolution. Electric cars overcome old prejudices. The Dacia Spring is one of the cheapest electric cars on the market. A real bargain or are there hidden catches? Volvo's answer to Tesla & Co. The new XC 40 comes with an extended range. How effective is it on a mountain road trip? (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are considered the epitome of a sports car, they are breathtaking and irresistible, the coupes from Ferrari, Lamborghini, Maserati and Alfa Romeo. Designed by the world's most famous designers, each Italian sports car is as excitingly beautiful as a work of art. Whether 8 or 12 cylinder, every engine is more than just a machine, every engine is a masterpiece. Whether Ferrari 488, Ferrari FF, Lamborghini Huracan and Aventador or Maserati Gran Coupe, DreamCars presents the most fascinating Italian coupes. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Lots of chrome, free-standing lamp pots, bulbous fenders, swelling shapes wherever you look – typical pre-war look. The Triumph 1800 was the British manufacturer's first new design after the Second World War. The four-seater with a mother-in-law seat, presented in 1947, established the long tradition of the British post-war roadster. The 1800 is not a tough corner robber, but rather a comfortable tourer for leisurely country trips. Also in the show: BMW 507 and Porsche 356 Cabrio. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: A world record of superlatives. The Porsche Taycan enters the Guinness Book of Records. Also: The hydrogen Hyundai Nexo, at the Hockenheimring with Walter Röhrl and the Skoda Trekka from the 1960s. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: And the Lamborghini legend begins with the name. Chronicle of the bullfight in 1879. In the arena of Cordoba, a bull resists the torreros and survives despite being stabbed 24 times. His name: Murcielago (station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Today we introduce a man who made history in motorsports. He won the 24-hour race four times in a row: Olaf Manthey. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: 125 years of Mercedes Benz - The largest Mercedes Benz meets at Berlin Tempelhof Airport with lots of highlights such as the legendary Silver Arrows and their even more legendary drivers, visitors and classic vehicles from all over the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The open-air season can start with these three convertibles! Smart is sending the latest version of its roofless dwarf to dealers. It is available as a 3-cylinder petrol engine with 71 or 90 hp. The Mini Convertible is bigger – and not just under the hood. It offers space for four people and the output ranges from 105 to 190 hp. When it comes to pure roadster feeling, there can only be one – the Mazda MX-5. The fourth generation of the topless classic in Perfect Ride. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: Super Seven – when you hear these words, car fans first think of Lotus. Because Colin Chapman developed the open kit racer, i.e. a kit car, in the 1950s. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. Swiss tuning dreams come true at Auto Emotion in Bern. Tuning looks under the hood of the Alpine countries. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Danger in your neck and still in a good mood? No problem for the full professionals at Action Concept. Spectacular stunts are her job – and her passion! Explosions, flights, jumps, breathtaking images and exciting behind-the-scene stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg visits the Classic Expo in Salzburg, where he speaks with organizer Hermann Schwarz and several fellow classic car enthusiasts. In between, a short detour takes you to the famous auction of the Toffen Oldtimer Gallery in Switzerland before returning to Salzburg. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Sand, water, rubble, snow, no matter what surface or weather, it should be able to handle it all! The Porsche 911 Dakar is one of the most extreme series 11s of all time. With its ancestor, the Porsche 953, the manufacturer won the legendary Paris Dakar Rally in 1984. The model is a homage to this sensational success. We test the extraordinary 911 off-road. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM Aquabike World Championship 2025
programme.sub-title: GP of Italy, Ski Division, Olbia

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Carbon fiber on motorcycles – does that make sense? Carbon: The fabric structure of the magical material from Formula 1 shimmers with high quality. Highly priced, but ultra stable and ultra light and therefore extremely attractive for racing and street motorcycles. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: The oil states in the Gulf – Actually everything here is big, bigger, biggest. Only an exclusive group of people like it Mini. Why? How can such a small car put such a big smile on people's faces? Fans come to the mini-festival from all over Arabia. Our research for mini-crazy people starts right here, in Dubai. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: An inconspicuous industrial building in Regensburg, Bavaria. The most innovative German bicycle manufacturer is currently based here: PG Bikes. The Regensburg-based company develops and produces electric bikes with a retro look. The boss and idea generator of PG Bikes is 33-year-old Manuel Ostner. After owning his own scooter workshop, he began pimping up bicycles and eventually producing e-bikes. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are spectacular and environmentally friendly, the most extravagant and fastest electric and hybrid cars in the world: whether Tesla, McLaren P1, Ferrari La Ferrari or Renovo Coupe, the battery- and hybrid-powered cars impress not only with their fascinating design, but also with intelligent technology, breathtaking acceleration and unique dynamics. Dream Cars presents the most exciting e-cars in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Their reputation is legendary, rally enthusiasts adore them: the monster rally cars of the so-called Group B. At the beginning of the 80s, a new classification entered rally sport. Suddenly turbocharged all-wheel-drive racing vehicles with up to 500 hp race across the international slopes. The drivers can barely control the vehicles, but with their sound and unbridled power they exert a huge fascination. Only the most serious accidents with dead drivers and fans put an end to the absolute irrationality. Today these cars enjoy cult status and are expensive collector's items. Also legendary: the BMW M E30 in the DTM version. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: If there is a typical BMW, it is the BMW 3 Series. It's fast, it's cult, it's the epitome of the sports sedan: the BMW 3 Series. Since its debut in 1975, the 3 Series has been the undisputed leader of the premium segment. More than 13 million customers worldwide have chosen a BMW 3 Series. The 3 Series is the right car for every requirement: it is a family sedan, sports car, tuning object and racing car. Car History shows all models and the entire history of the '3 Series'. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many racers at heart race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the Green Hell is a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: This time in Enduropark Training – Shirin takes part in an Enduro; Take part in off-road training at the Enduropark Hechlingen and realize that it is anything but a picnic. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The latest innovations in the automotive industry have been presented in Paris since 1898. This makes the Paris Motor Show the oldest trade fair in the world and provides an insight into the automotive world of tomorrow. One attempt by manufacturers is to replace the traditional combustion engine with alternative drives. Mercedes-Benz founded the Generation EQ sub-brand specifically for this purpose. Under the slogan "think new", Volkswagen wants to introduce 20 new electric models by 2020 and finally put the diesel scandal behind it. In addition to the drive of the future, Perfect Ride presents the manufacturers' design visions. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Rearview mirror puts the NSU Ro 80 in the spotlight today. With its revolutionary aerodynamic body and its new engine technology, a Wankel engine, it caused a sensation when it first appeared in 1967. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Pimping, boarding, showing off - today's topics in tuning: Racing flounder with motorcycle power - we're hitting the Hockenheimring in magic X one. Full blast: The D1 Drift Championship – driving sideways at the absolute limit. Tuning EXPO Saarbruecken: 1000 cars, 230 exhibitors and the choice of the Tuning Expo Cover Girl (channel info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes are on tour! On an industrial site in Thuringia they find the ideal place to jump with their stunt car across a moving truck trailer. Problem: the trailer is brand new and must under no circumstances be broken... A special challenge for stunt coordinator Domi and his team! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, presenter Martin Utberg accompanies visitors to the Cars & Friends event at the Hans-Peter Porsche Traumwerk in Anger near Salzburg through a weekend full of automotive passion and enthusiasm. The focus throughout the day will be on motorsport legends Walter Röhrl, Christian Geistdörfer and Hans Joachim Strietzel Stuck, who will create enormous enthusiasm among visitors. Top Speed ​​is also taking part in the celebrations surrounding the 50th anniversary of the VW Golf GTI, where hundreds of Golf owners from Germany and Austria travel to the dream factory. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Compact high-performance models have a long-standing tradition at BMW. From the 2002 turbo to the 1 Series M Coupe to the current M2. We take a closer look at the second generation and test the drifting potential, racing and everyday qualities of the M2. What does he do best? We also look at its history and development and take a look at its competitors. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM Aquabike World Championship 2025
programme.sub-title: GP of Italy, Ski Division, Olbia

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes the audience to the Klassikwelt Bodensee in Friedrichshafen, an event that is much more than a classic car fair. In addition to vintage and youngtimers, visitors can expect a varied program with demonstration drives of historic racing cars, an air show, a historic paddock and numerous encounters with collectors, racing drivers and enthusiasts. Top Speed ​​discovers why the Klassikwelt Bodensee is one of the most diverse classical events in Europe. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes part in the Spalatin Historic, a one-day classic car rally in aid of a good cause. Together with organizer Stefan von Heyden, Martin discovers the Franconian region. During the various breaks, entertaining special stages ensure many smiling faces among participants and spectators. In this program, Top Speed ​​also takes viewers to Lucerne, where Martin gets involved behind the scenes at a classic car auction by the Oldtimer Galerie Toffen at the Swiss Classic World. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. In 1997 Ferrari celebrated the company's 50th birthday. At that time, Wolfgang Rother followed the Ferrari myth and collected his first driving impressions with the Ferrari 550 Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.desc: Bitter fights for championship titles, fierce duels for race victories and even disputes between teammates: motorsport has been characterized by feuds since its early days. Even in Formula 1 there are always heated rivalries and duels. The Racing Files looks at the exciting battles for world championship titles in the premier class of formula racing. (Station info).

programme.title: The Killer Clown: Murder on the Doorstep
programme.desc: In 1990, Marlene is shot by a clown and detectives try to find a motive for her murder; her husband Michael becomes the prime suspect after detectives learn their marriage was on the rocks, but an anonymous tip leads investigators to another suspect.

programme.title: The Killer Clown: Murder on the Doorstep
programme.desc: Michael's affair leads detectives to investigate his alleged mistress Sheila; a lead on the costume from a store puts Sheila firmly in the frame, but without evidence the case goes cold; then in 2017, new DNA evidence leads detectives to an arrest.

programme.title: The Killer Clown: Murder on the Doorstep
programme.desc: After Sheila's arrest, the prosecution prepares for trial and the stakes are high; the prosecution's case centers on new DNA and fiber evidence; Sheila's defense attorney attempts to get the evidence thrown out.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: S4 E9 — Tuning World BodenseeThe largest tuning trade fair in Europe takes place every year in Friedrichshafen: The Tuning World Bodensee. Over 200 international exhibitors from the areas of tuning vehicles and accessories present themselves on 85,000 square meters of exhibition space.

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: S1 E2Paramedic Ste Hill rushes to a roadside accident. A motorcyclist left the road and collided with an electrical box on the side of the road. Ste Hill does his best for the motorcyclist before he is taken to hospital.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: New HeritageThis episode gets to the bottom of the current retro trend: purist café racers and similarly classic motorcycles in the style of the 50s to 80s are on the rise worldwide. Hollywood star Orlando Bloom had a BMW S 1000 R individually tuned in Los Angeles under the motto New Heritage. The episode shows his classically styled custom bike and other representatives of the heritage scene at the Concorso d'Eleganza Villa d'Este on Lake Como and at the Wheels And Waves festival in Biarritz.

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: S2 E4 — Episode 17The show takes a closer look at the daily work of the ADAC traffic jam advisors.

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: S2 E26 — Setra BusesThe program highlights the bus factories in Neu-Ulm, which are known worldwide.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: E45 — The Logistics of the FutureConsumers can now shop online at any time of the day or night and expect everything to arrive on time. But how does it all work so smoothly, safely and on time? How does the logistics industry overcome such challenges?

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: S1 E19 — International LimousinesInternational limousines represent status, prestige and perfection more than any other car.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: S2 E3 — Episode 3We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the curve. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S2 E7 — Unique piecesWhen you think of Aston Martin, you think of James Bond and incredibly expensive and sleek sports cars. The British luxury brand also had limousines in its range. The show presents the Aston Martin Lagonda Shooting Brake and other unique items.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E10 — Episode 10 Hamburg Airport is experimenting with the climate-neutral production of kerosene. It's also about the Porsche 911 Turbo at the Hockenheimring with ex-rally world champion Walter Röhrl. Everyone is also testing the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S2 E33 — Porsche 911 vs. Chevrolet CorvetteThe Porsche 911 and the Chevrolet Corvette are two legends and dream cars. The cars are sports car icons in Europe and the USA. They shine with a unique design and are considered the epitome of a sports car.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: S1 E22 — Tourists in the Green Hell 22 Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: BMW M1 MeetingEvery year, thousands of motorsport fans make the pilgrimage to the Histo-Cup Austria at the Salzburgring to admire more than 200 historic racing cars in action. We saw the first presentation of the BMW M1 Procar series since 1979 there.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S3 E15 — Parking Space WarEvery day, city dwellers wage a nerve-wracking battle for the last remaining parking space. The number of vehicles on the roads is constantly increasing. In addition, the models are constantly growing in length and width, such as the BMW X6.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: S2 E3 — Man vs. MachineThe Stunt Heroes are developing the plot for a chase between a parkour runner and a pursuer in a car. An assembly hall offers enough space for this. Here, chase sequences, corner drifts, jumps and the final escape jump of the hunted person into a passing gravel dump truck can be carried out cleanly. The timing has to be precise, otherwise the stuntman will end up kissing the ground.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Icon of the New Heritage wave: BMW R nineT In 2013, the BMW R nineT, a puristic retro roadster, came onto the market that one would not have expected from the brand from Munich, which is considered to be conservative. The modern technology is deliberately prepared for individual conversion to custom bikes, which are becoming increasingly popular in the young motorcycle scene worldwide. The program shows the idea behind the concept of the retro roadster and what qualities and possible weaknesses the classic boxer motorcycle reveals in practical testing.

programme.title: Skate Tales

programme.title: Skate Tales
programme.desc: S3 E2 — Takahiro MoritaMadars heads to Japan to meet Takahiro Morita, who, more than anyone else, has put his own unique stamp on Japanese skate culture.

programme.title: Skate Tales
programme.desc: S3 E3 — Vitória MendonçaMadras Apse visits a young Brazilian skateboarder in this episode. Vitoria Mendonca hasn't always had it easy and had to overcome many hurdles to reach her goal. Now she is considered a pioneer and role model.

programme.title: Skate Tales
programme.desc: S3 E5 — Richie JacksonRichie Jackson doesn't follow the unwritten rules of skateboarding. His wild ingenuity and inventive approach amaze people and cause disagreements.

programme.title: SURF: Shaping Jordy
programme.desc: For the first time in 10 years, surfer Jordy Smith is spending the winter in his native South Africa. With the free surfing master Mikey February he goes there in search of the best waves.

programme.title: With the SUP across the open sea
programme.desc: Casper Steinfath is preparing mentally and physically for an extreme challenge. He wants to be the first person to successfully cover the distance from Denmark to Norway on a stand-up paddleboard. Will he succeed?

programme.title: BIKE: Red Bull Hardline - Best of 2025
programme.desc: The show reports on the toughest downhill mountain bike race around the globe.

programme.title: UCI MTB World Cup 2025: Val di Sole - Highlights
programme.desc: E130Val di Sole offers top-class cross-country and downhill racing on its legendary routes in the picturesque Trentino region.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Racing: Top 50 Designs
programme.desc: Self-built racing cars, steep courses and lots of obstacles: the “Red Bull Soapbox Race” combines speed with chaos. This time the 50 most ingenious designs of the cult format will be presented.

programme.title: Red Bull Trapped
programme.desc: A rapper and a creator in a crazy hip-hop escape room. Under time pressure, they have to solve rap-related puzzles, games and creative challenges in order to escape.

programme.title: Pole vaulter chasing records
programme.desc: At the age of 24, he has already broken seven records. Sheer courage has made Armand "Mondo" Duplantis one of the most extraordinary athletes of the century - but can he continue to raise the bar inch by inch.

programme.title: Skate Tales
programme.desc: S5 E5 — Dern BrothersMadars watches the Dern Brothers shake up skateboarding on YouTube.

programme.title: Born Racers
programme.desc: S1 E3 — FatherhoodRico ventures to the frozen lakes of Finland while Ruché fights elsewhere.

programme.title: Born Racers

programme.desc: Andy Anderson is the chameleon of skateboarding. Whether street or park, contest or freestyle, everything is possible in Andy's world. Madars Apse heads to Venice Beach, Los Angeles to meet the legend who defies categorization.

programme.title: Skate Tales
